strategies.description: Pattern around 'coding': 259 lessons share this theme. Example: Gemini-2.5-pro is a reliable and stable choice for medium-complexity reasoning and coding tasks.
Pattern around 'tasks': 165 lessons share this theme. Example: gemini-2.5-flash is highly efficient for trivial tasks like extraction and summarization, but it performs unreliably on ...
Pattern around 'choice': 138 lessons share this theme. Example: For other:easy tasks, gemini-2.5-flash is a reliable, cost-effective choice (verified in production at ~100% quality).
Pattern around 'classification': 10 lessons share this theme. Example: Gemini-2.5-flash is efficient for trivial tasks but unreliable for classification.
Pattern around 'data': 9 lessons share this theme. Example: gpt-4o-mini demonstrates superior consistency for complex coding tasks and data structure implementations.
